demographics.living_situation: lives alone in a private residence

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My foot feels like it is on fire, and even the bedsheet touching it sends me into absolute agony.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The burning pain in my right foot and lower leg flared up badly over the last day and I can't put any weight on it or bear anything touching it. The paracetamol and ibuprofen aren't doing a thing.

symptom_narrative.onset: sudden worsening tonight, on a background that started a few weeks ago after I broke a small bone in my leg
symptom_narrative.duration: flare has been building over about 24 hours
symptom_narrative.character: burning, on-fire pain; throbbing when my leg hangs down
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: unbearable — the worst it has ever been; even a bedsheet touching my skin is agony
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: right foot and lower leg, worst over the top of my foot
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant now, much worse when the leg is lower than my body
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing so far; keeping the leg up seems slightly less awful
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: anything touching it, letting the leg hang down, trying to stand or wear a shoe
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: the leg looks swollen and the skin colour has changed and looks mottled; it seems to be sweating differently to the other leg
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: the pain has been there since the fracture a few weeks ago but nothing like this tonight
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: stuck in bed tonight; can't tolerate footwear or put any weight through the leg

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a minor fracture of the shin bone a few weeks ago
past_medical_history.how_managed: treated as a minor fracture; has been healing

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; worried about falling because the leg won't work and the pain is so bad

communication_style.typical_message_style: urgent, describes the pain vividly and in extreme terms

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home cuff while in severe pain and distress
may be elevated by pain and distress rather than a primary problem

objective_data_offered.value: right lower leg and foot look swollen with tight shiny skin and a mottled, reddish colour change; the other leg looks normal
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-held camera and lighting; colour changes are hard to judge remotely
